name: Blue Wave Kids' Plush Throw Blanket - Pillowfort™
description: Infuse cozy flair into your child’s room with this Wave Plush Throw Blanket from Pillowfort™. Boasting a year-round fabric construction, this faux-fur throw blanket showcases a textural wave design in light blue for a lovely look. Drape it over a couch or armchair in their room and machine wash it for easy upkeep.
